      Watpac Concrete Elastic Black Paste

      ₹500 + GST per kg

      8 Reviews 6 sold in last 16 hours

      Product Details :

      Shipping: Free door delivery all around India.

      Watpac Concrete Elastic Black Paste is a high-quality, eco-friendly, and flexible single-component liquid membrane designed to protect surfaces against water damage, stains, and erosion. It is easy to apply and requires no additional water.
